within an Angular monorepo setup. We're glad that the Storybook support for Angular improved a lot over the last couple of releases s.t. we can ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"now directly use the Storybook native builders for Angular"}]," (",["$","code",null,{"children":"@storybook/angular:start-storybook"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"@storybook/angular:build-storybook"}],"). And apart from releasing Lerna 5 with important package upgrades, we wanted to solve Lerna's biggest pain point: being slow. ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/blog/lerna-used-to-walk-now-it-can-fly","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"We published an article","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," on how we envision that strategy 2 weeks ago and as part of that we've been digging deep into the Nx core and have been doing some proper profiling."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":"The result: Nx itself got faster as well 😃."}],["$","p",null,{"children":"Here's the result of running our benchmark using the latest version of Nx 14.2:"}],["$","$Ld",null,{"language":"plaintext","fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"* average lage time is: 10203.6\n* average turbo time is: 1532.3\n* average lerna (powered by nx) time is: 272.2\n* average nx time is: 194.8\n* nx is 52.379876796714576x faster than lage\n* nx is 7.866016427104722x faster than turbo\n* nx is 1.3973305954825461x faster than lerna (powered by nx)\n"}],["$","p",null,{"children":["(as always, feel free to ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://github.com/vsavkin/large-monorepo","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"reproduce it customize the processes and behavior of your monorepo tooling to your own needs, makes working with it pleasant and allows you to get most out of it. Whether it is to customize the code generation aspect to your company coding styleguide and best practices, to automate the setup of new projects or even add support for languages such as Go, .Net or Flutter. ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/community","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Nx Plugins","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," enable such support and really help you make Nx work in the best possible way for your current scenario."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Nx plugin support has been around for a while. Just have a look at our ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/community","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Nx community plugins page","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],". And we keep improving it. We added support for ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yGUrF0-uqaU","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"Nx Plugin presets","target":"_blank","rel":"noreferrer","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}]," and ",["$","$Lb",null,{"prefetch":false,"href":"/blog/nx-v14-is-out-here-is-all-you-need-to-know","passHref":true,"replace":false,"scroll":true,"shallow":false,"children":"lately also the ability for local plugins","target":"$undefined","rel":"$undefined","className":"text-blue-600 transition-colors ease-out hover:text-blue-700 dark:text-sky-500 dark:hover:text-sky-400"}],". In this release, we add proper ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"linting support for Nx Plugin development"}],"."]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["Ever happened to you that you mistyped the implementation file in your ",["$","code",null,{"children":"generators.json"}]," configuration file of your plugin? Well guess what, now the linting process would warn you about:"]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["$","img",null,{"src":"/documentation/blog/images/2022-06-09/mbcZT24F7G8mbRGEnJ7iEg.avif","alt":"","loading":"lazy"}]}],["$","p",null,{"children":["When you generate a new Nx plugin, you should now have a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"@nrwl/nx/nx-plugin-checks"}]," configuration in your ",["$","code",null,{"children":".eslintrc.json"}]," file."]}],["$","$Ld",null,{"language":"json","fileName":"","highlightLines":[],"lineGroups":{},"command":"","title":"","path":"","skipRescope":false,"enableCopy":true,"lineWrap":0,"children":"{\n
